dashboard.label: Knowledge layer — health
dashboard.description: Per-connector latency, routing behaviour, and rule-match telemetry for the AiWorkbench knowledge layer (v0.10.0+). See docs/KNOWLEDGE_LAYER.md.

panel.title: Calls per kind (route / search / fetch / probe / describe / report)

search.query: index=* sourcetype=ai_knowledge_metrics | spath path=kind output=k | stats count by k | sort -count

index=* sourcetype=ai_knowledge_metrics kind=ai_knowledge_search | spath | where isnotnull(latency_ms) | stats median(latency_ms) as p50_ms, perc95(latency_ms) as p95_ms, count as call_count, sum(eval(ok=="true" OR ok==true)) as ok_count by connector | eval p50_ms=round(p50_ms,0), p95_ms=round(p95_ms,0) | eval ok_rate=round(ok_count*100/call_count,1) | sort -call_count | table connector, call_count, p50_ms, p95_ms, ok_rate
index=* sourcetype=ai_knowledge_metrics kind=ai_knowledge_route | spath | stats count by shortlist_size
index=* sourcetype=ai_knowledge_metrics kind=ai_knowledge_search | spath | eval routed=if(was_routed=="true" OR was_routed==true, "routed", "fallback") | stats count by routed

index=* sourcetype=ai_knowledge_metrics (kind=ai_knowledge_timeout OR kind=ai_knowledge_search) | spath | where (kind="ai_knowledge_timeout") OR ((kind="ai_knowledge_search") AND (ok=="false" OR ok==false)) | stats sum(eval(kind="ai_knowledge_timeout")) as timeouts, sum(eval(kind="ai_knowledge_search" AND (ok=="false" OR ok==false))) as errors by connector | where (timeouts+errors)>0 | sort -timeouts

index=* sourcetype=ai_knowledge_metrics kind=ai_knowledge_static_rule_match | spath | stats count as reports, sum(eval(used=="true" OR used==true)) as used_count by connector, source_id | eval use_rate=round(used_count*100/reports,1) | sort -reports
index=* sourcetype=ai_knowledge_metrics kind=ai_knowledge_fetch | spath | where injection_flagged=="true" OR injection_flagged==true | stats count by connector, source_id, kind | sort -count
index=* sourcetype=ai_knowledge_metrics kind=ai_knowledge_probe | spath | where ok=="false" OR ok==false | stats latest(reason) as last_reason, count as fail_count by connector | sort -fail_count
